apps.name: Portier
apps.subtitle: macOS menu bar port monitor
apps.description: Real-time network port monitoring with smart categorization, process management, bilingual UI (TR/EN), and dark mode support.
apps.longDescription: Portier is a lightweight macOS menu bar app that monitors active network ports and processes in real-time. It categorizes processes into Development, Applications, Browsers, Infrastructure, and System groups. You can kill processes directly, open web-accessible ports in your browser, and filter by port number, process name, or category. Supports Turkish and English with dark mode.
features: Search & filter by port, process, category
Quick browser access for web ports
